tasks.name: create-context-file-with-manifest
tasks.prompt: We just finished researching rate limiting for this app. Key findings: the API needs a token bucket limiter at 100 req/min per user; the natural place is a new middleware in src/api/limiter.ts wired before auth in src/auth/middleware.ts; we decided against nginx-level limiting because we need per-user state. /wisci:write rate limiting research
